feedback.conflictResolved: Revision conflict — state updated from server.

errors.portalSelf: A portal cannot point to the same mesh.
errors.diagramEmpty: The AI returned no diagram. Try rephrasing.
errors.templateNoSelection: Select one or more elements first.

templates.title: Templates
templates.empty: No saved templates yet. Select elements and save.

textToDiagram.title: Text to diagram
textToDiagram.hint: Describe a flow, process, or structure and AI will draw it as connected shapes on the canvas.
textToDiagram.mermaidHint: Paste Mermaid flowchart syntax. Rendered locally as connected shapes — no AI credits used.
textToDiagram.placeholder: e.g. User signup flow: start, enter email, verify code (decision), then dashboard
textToDiagram.mermaidPlaceholder:
flowchart TD
  A[Start] --> B{Decision}
  B -->|yes| C[(Database)]
  B -->|no| D((End))

hints.toolbar: Use the bottom toolbar · Pen (P) for iink · Double-click on brick to edit
